description: Dynamic bridge — 2026-05-21 session. Crude relief after Trump called off Iran strikes. Brent crashed to $108.63 (-2.38%). Nifty closed +0.17% at 23,659.

market_regime.key_risk: Trump called off Iran military strike May 20 after Gulf allies appealed. Brent crashed -2.38% to $108.63, WTI -5.56% to $101.78. Talks reportedly in progress via Saudi/Qatar/UAE mediation. BUT Iran (Tasnim) says US conditions still overly demanding — no deal yet. Regime shifting from FRAGILE_PEACE to potential DIPLOMATIC_PROGRESS but binary risk persists.

But Trump sent nuclear proposal May 16 + Xi offered diplomatic help May 15 — diplomatic process continues despite rejection. Stalemate is now the dominant base case at 55%. Escalation 30% accounts for Israel-Iran kinetic action risk.
